arts.ttl: Player finds himself in ‘form crisis’ after Crystal Palace exit – Comparisons to icon long gone
arts.sum: Michael Olise has found himself in a ‘form crisis’ at Bayern Munich, with his early displays for the German giants now a distant memory. That’s according to BILD, who cover the former Crystal Palace star today and how he appears to have fallen off a cliff in terms of his form.
